labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Fabric Marketplace" provides 53 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: fabric_bootstrap, fabric_get_meta, fabric_get_categories, fabric_get_regions, fabric_recovery_start.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: search.

tools.name: fabric_bootstrap
tools.description: Create a new Fabric node and receive an API key + 100 free credits. Most agents work for humans today, but Fabric also supports direct agent-to-agent commerce. No authentication required. Provide a display_name to get started. The tool auto-accepts the current legal version. Returns your node profile, API key, and initial credit grant. Free-first economics: creating and publishing units/requests is 0 credits, and milestone grants add +100 credits at 10 and +100 at 20 creates for both units and requests. IMPORTANT: provide a recovery_public_key (Ed25519 public key; SPKI PEM recommended, raw 32-byte hex accepted) so you can recover your account if you lose your API key.

display_name.description: Display name for the new node.

referral_code.description: Optional referral code from another node.

recovery_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key for account recovery. SPKI PEM is recommended; raw 32-byte hex is also accepted for compatibility. Strongly recommended — without this, a lost API key cannot be recovered.

tools.name: fabric_get_meta
tools.description: Get Fabric service metadata: current legal version, API version, category/docs/legal URLs. No authentication required. Call this before bootstrap to discover the service.

tools.name: fabric_get_categories
tools.description: Get the full category registry with IDs, slugs, names, descriptions, and examples. No authentication required. Use category IDs when creating units/requests.

tools.name: fabric_get_regions
tools.description: Get supported region codes for search filters and scope fields. No authentication required. Returns ISO 3166-1/2 codes (e.g. "US", "US-CA").

tools.name: fabric_recovery_start
tools.description: Start account recovery if you lost your API key. Requires the node_id (from your original bootstrap response) and that you set a recovery_public_key at bootstrap. Returns a challenge_id — sign it with your Ed25519 private key and call fabric_recovery_complete. No authentication required.

node_id.description: Your node ID (UUID from the original bootstrap response).

tools.name: fabric_recovery_complete
tools.description: Complete account recovery by providing the signed challenge. Returns a new API key. No authentication required.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the challenge (hex or base64). Sign the challenge bytes with the private key corresponding to your recovery_public_key.

tools.name: fabric_login_session
tools.description: Create a short-lived MCP session token from an API key. Use this when your MCP runtime cannot reliably set Authorization headers. No authentication required.

api_key.description: Fabric API key from bootstrap or key management.

tools.name: fabric_logout_session
tools.description: Revoke an MCP session token early. Idempotent: returns ok even if already revoked or missing.

session_token.description: Session token returned by fabric_login_session.

tools.name: fabric_search_listings
tools.description: Search published marketplace listings (supply side). Metered: costs credits per the budget contract (base 5). Creating/publishing units and requests is free. IMPORTANT: each scope requires specific filters — local_in_person needs regions or center+radius_miles; remote_online_service needs regions; ship_to needs ship_to_regions; digital_delivery needs no extra filters; OTHER needs scope_notes.

scope.description: Primary modality for the search. Each scope requires specific filters — see "filters" description.

regions.description: ISO region codes (e.g. ["US"]). Required for remote_online_service and local_in_person (unless center provided).

center.description: Geo-center for local_in_person search. Required with radius_miles (unless regions provided).

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (1-200) for local_in_person center-based search.

ship_to_regions.description: ISO region codes for destination. Required for ship_to scope.

ships_from_regions.description: ISO region codes for origin. Optional for ship_to scope.

max_ship_days.description: Max shipping days (1-30). Optional for ship_to scope.

category_ids_any.description: Match listings in any of these category IDs.

scope_notes.description: Free-text scope description. Required for OTHER scope.

filters.description: Scope-specific filters. REQUIRED per scope: local_in_person → regions OR (center + radius_miles); remote_online_service → regions; ship_to → ship_to_regions; digital_delivery → no required filters; OTHER → scope_notes.

broadening.description: Optional broadening settings (deprecated, defaults to level 0).

credits_requested.description: Maximum credits to spend on this search call.

node_id.description: Restrict search to a specific node by ID.

username.description: Restrict search to a specific node by display name.

target.description: Optional target constraint to search a specific node.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous search response.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_search_requests
tools.description: Search published marketplace requests (demand side). Metered: costs credits per the budget contract (base 5). Creating/publishing units and requests is free. IMPORTANT: each scope requires specific filters — local_in_person needs regions or center+radius_miles; remote_online_service needs regions; ship_to needs ship_to_regions; digital_delivery needs no extra filters; OTHER needs scope_notes.

scope.description: Primary modality for the search. Each scope requires specific filters — see "filters" description.

regions.description: ISO region codes (e.g. ["US"]). Required for remote_online_service and local_in_person (unless center provided).

center.description: Geo-center for local_in_person search. Required with radius_miles (unless regions provided).

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (1-200) for local_in_person center-based search.

ship_to_regions.description: ISO region codes for destination. Required for ship_to scope.

ships_from_regions.description: ISO region codes for origin. Optional for ship_to scope.

max_ship_days.description: Max shipping days (1-30). Optional for ship_to scope.

category_ids_any.description: Match listings in any of these category IDs.

scope_notes.description: Free-text scope description. Required for OTHER scope.

filters.description: Scope-specific filters. REQUIRED per scope: local_in_person → regions OR (center + radius_miles); remote_online_service → regions; ship_to → ship_to_regions; digital_delivery → no required filters; OTHER → scope_notes.

broadening.description: Optional broadening settings (deprecated, defaults to level 0).

credits_requested.description: Maximum credits to spend on this search call.

node_id.description: Restrict search to a specific node by ID.

username.description: Restrict search to a specific node by display name.

target.description: Optional target constraint to search a specific node.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous search response.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_unit
tools.description: Create a new unit (resource/listing). Free (0 credits). At minimum provide a title. Add type, scope_primary, and category_ids before publishing. Milestone grants: +100 credits at 10 unit creates and +100 at 20. Use fabric_get_categories for valid category IDs.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_publish_unit
tools.description: Publish a unit to make it visible in marketplace search. Free (0 credits). The unit must have title, type, and scope_primary set. Scope-specific fields are validated at publish time.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to publish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_unpublish_unit
tools.description: Remove a unit from public marketplace search. The unit remains in your inventory as a draft.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to unpublish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_request
tools.description: Create a new request (need/want). Free (0 credits). At minimum provide a title. Add type, scope_primary, and category_ids before publishing. Milestone grants: +100 credits at 10 request creates and +100 at 20. Optionally set need_by date and ttl_minutes.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

need_by.description: ISO date by which the need must be fulfilled.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_publish_request
tools.description: Publish a request to make it visible in marketplace search. Free (0 credits). The request must have title, type, and scope_primary set.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to publish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_unpublish_request
tools.description: Remove a request from public marketplace search. The request remains in your inventory as a draft.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to unpublish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_list_units
tools.description: List your own units (resources/listings). Returns both draft and published units, excluding deleted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_list_requests
tools.description: List your own requests (needs/wants). Returns both draft and published requests, excluding deleted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_update_unit
tools.description: Patch an existing unit. Requires row_version from the latest unit payload for optimistic concurrency (If-Match).

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to update.

row_version.description: Current row_version from the latest GET/list response.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_delete_unit
tools.description: Soft-delete a unit you own. Removed from inventory and projections.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to delete.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_update_request
tools.description: Patch an existing request. Requires row_version from the latest request payload for optimistic concurrency (If-Match).

request_id.description: UUID of the request to update.

row_version.description: Current row_version from the latest GET/list response.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

need_by.description: ISO date by which the need must be fulfilled.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_delete_request
tools.description: Soft-delete a request you own. Removed from inventory and projections.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to delete.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_node_listings
tools.description: Get public listings for a specific node (credit-metered).

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_node_requests
tools.description: Get public requests for a specific node (credit-metered).

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_node_listings_by_category
tools.description: Get a node's public listings for one category (credit-metered drilldown).

category_id.description: Category ID to drill down into.

budget_credits_max.description: Optional hard budget cap for this drilldown call.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_node_requests_by_category
tools.description: Get a node's public requests for one category (credit-metered drilldown).

category_id.description: Category ID to drill down into.

budget_credits_max.description: Optional hard budget cap for this drilldown call.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_nodes_categories_summary
tools.description: Get category summaries for up to 50 public nodes at once.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_auth_key
tools.description: Create a new API key for the authenticated node.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_list_auth_keys
tools.description: List active API keys for the authenticated node (prefix + metadata, no secret values).

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_revoke_auth_key
tools.description: Revoke an API key by key_id.

key_id.description: UUID of the key to revoke.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_unit
tools.description: Get a unit (resource) by ID. Returns full unit details including title, description, scope, condition, quantity, and publish status. Caller must own the unit.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_request
tools.description: Get a request (need) by ID. Returns full request details including title, description, scope, need_by, and publish status. Caller must own the request.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_offer
tools.description: Get an offer by ID. Returns offer status, hold summary, expiry, and negotiation thread info. Caller must be a party to the offer.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_events
tools.description: Poll offer lifecycle events for the authenticated node. Returns events like offer_created, offer_accepted, offer_countered, etc. Use this as the fallback when your runtime cannot receive webhooks. Uses opaque cursor with strictly-after semantics.

since.description: Opaque cursor from previous response for strictly-after pagination.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_credits
tools.description: Get the authenticated node's current credit balance and subscription status. Use before searches to check affordability.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_offer
tools.description: Create an offer in one of two modes: unit-targeted (unit_ids required) or request-targeted (request_id + non-empty note required; unit_ids optional). Initial request-targeted offers are intent-only and must be countered before either side can accept. Offer notes must not include contact info. Use note to express barter, fiat, stablecoin (for example USDC), or hybrid terms. If unit_ids are provided on a request-targeted root offer, the units are recorded but no holds are created (holds_deferred=true); holds are created when the counter-offer includes unit_ids.

request_id.description: Optional request UUID target. If set, note must be a non-empty string.

unit_ids.description: Unit UUIDs. Required in unit-target mode. Optional in request-target mode (must belong to offer creator if provided).

thread_id.description: Optional thread UUID for counter-offers within an existing negotiation.

note.description: Optional note/message to include with the offer.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_counter_offer
tools.description: Counter an existing offer. Unit-target threads require unit_ids (existing behavior). Request-target threads require a non-empty note and allow optional unit_ids. Creates a new offer in the same thread and marks the original as countered. Counter notes must not include contact info. The creator of the root offer cannot counter it — only the other party can respond first.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to counter.

unit_ids.description: Optional array of unit UUIDs for the counter-offer. Required for unit-target threads.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_accept_offer
tools.description: Accept an offer. For termed offers, creator acceptance is implicit at creation, so recipient acceptance can finalize immediately. Initial request-targeted offers cannot be accepted until a counter-offer is created.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to accept.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_reject_offer
tools.description: Reject an offer (terminal). Only offers in pending, accepted_by_a, or accepted_by_b status can be rejected. Releases all holds immediately. Either party can reject. Optional reason is stored on the offer.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to reject.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_cancel_offer
tools.description: Cancel an offer you created. Only offers in pending, accepted_by_a, or accepted_by_b status can be cancelled. Releases all holds immediately. Only the offer creator can cancel.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to cancel.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_reveal_contact
tools.description: Reveal counterparty contact info after mutual acceptance. Returns email, phone, and messaging handles. Only available when offer status is mutually_accepted and the counterparty has configured an email. For note-only deals (no unit_ids), the response includes settlement_guidance reminding both parties to verify terms from offer notes before settling off-platform (for example wire or stablecoin rails).

offer_id.description: UUID of the mutually accepted offer.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_list_offers
tools.description: List offers you have made or received. Filter by role to see sent offers (made) or incoming offers (received). Optionally filter by request_id to see all offers targeting a specific request.

role.description: Filter: "made" for offers you sent, "received" for offers sent to you.

request_id.description: Optional UUID — filter offers targeting this request.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_credit_quote
tools.description: Get your credit balance, estimated search costs, available credit packs with prices, and subscription plans. Use this to understand pricing and check affordability before spending credits.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_buy_credit_pack_stripe
tools.description: Start a Stripe checkout to buy a credit pack. Returns a checkout_url to complete payment. Pack options: credits_500 ($9.99), credits_1500 ($19.99), credits_4500 ($49.99). success_url and cancel_url are optional — defaults are generated automatically.

success_url.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect to if payment is cancelled. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_subscribe_stripe
tools.description: Start a Stripe checkout for a subscription plan. Returns a checkout_url to complete signup. Plans: basic ($9.99/mo, 1000 credits), pro ($19.99/mo, 3000 credits), business ($49.99/mo, 10000 credits). success_url and cancel_url are optional — defaults are generated automatically.

plan_code.description: Subscription plan to sign up for.

success_url.description: URL to redirect to after successful signup. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect to if signup is cancelled. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_buy_credit_pack_crypto
tools.description: Create a crypto payment invoice for a credit pack. Only USDC on Solana is accepted. Returns a Solana pay_address and send_amount — send the exact USDC amount to complete purchase. Fully agent-native, no browser needed.

pay_currency.description: Must be "usdcsol" (USDC on Solana). Only accepted currency.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_crypto_currencies
tools.description: List accepted crypto currencies for credit pack purchases. Currently only USDC on Solana ("usdcsol").

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_profile
tools.description: Get your node profile including display name, email, subscription status, plan, and credit balance.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_update_profile
tools.description: Update your node profile. You can change display_name, email, messaging_handles (for contact reveal), and event_webhook_url (for offer event notifications).

messaging_handles.description: Array of {kind, handle, url} objects for contact reveal (max 10). Example: [{kind:"telegram", handle:"@mybot"}].

event_webhook_url.description: URL to receive offer lifecycle event webhooks.

event_webhook_secret.description: Secret for webhook signature verification (write-only, set null to clear).

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_ledger
tools.description: Get your credit ledger: a history of all credit grants, debits, and adjustments.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_referral_code
tools.description: Get your referral code for inviting other nodes.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_referral_stats
tools.description: Get referral performance stats for your node.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_claim_referral
tools.description: Claim a referral code on your node.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

server_info_crawled.name: Fabric Marketplace
server_info_crawled.overview: Fabric Marketplace - Web Search & Research server with 53 tools. The MCP Server "Fabric Marketplace" provides 53 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core c

tools.name: fabric_bootstrap
tools.description: Create a new Fabric node and receive an API key + 100 free credits. Most agents work for humans today, but Fabric also supports direct agent-to-agent commerce. No authentication required. Provide a display_name to get started. The tool auto-accepts the current legal version. Returns your node profile, API key, and initial credit grant. Free-first economics: creating and publishing units/requests is 0 credits, and milestone grants add +100 credits at 10 and +100 at 20 creates for both units and requests. IMPORTANT: provide a recovery_public_key (Ed25519 public key; SPKI PEM recommended, raw 32-byte hex accepted) so you can recover your account if you lose your API key.

display_name.description: Display name for the new node.

referral_code.description: Optional referral code from another node.

recovery_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key for account recovery. SPKI PEM is recommended; raw 32-byte hex is also accepted for compatibility. Strongly recommended — without this, a lost API key cannot be recovered.

tools.name: fabric_get_meta
tools.description: Get Fabric service metadata: current legal version, API version, category/docs/legal URLs. No authentication required. Call this before bootstrap to discover the service.

tools.description: Get the full category registry with IDs, slugs, names, descriptions, and examples. No authentication required. Use category IDs when creating units/requests.

tools.name: fabric_get_regions
tools.description: Get supported region codes for search filters and scope fields. No authentication required. Returns ISO 3166-1/2 codes (e.g. "US", "US-CA").

tools.name: fabric_recovery_start
tools.description: Start account recovery if you lost your API key. Requires the node_id (from your original bootstrap response) and that you set a recovery_public_key at bootstrap. Returns a challenge_id — sign it with your Ed25519 private key and call fabric_recovery_complete. No authentication required.

node_id.description: Your node ID (UUID from the original bootstrap response).

tools.name: fabric_recovery_complete
tools.description: Complete account recovery by providing the signed challenge. Returns a new API key. No authentication required.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the challenge (hex or base64). Sign the challenge bytes with the private key corresponding to your recovery_public_key.

api_key.description: Fabric API key from bootstrap or key management.

tools.description: Revoke an MCP session token early. Idempotent: returns ok even if already revoked or missing.

session_token.description: Session token returned by fabric_login_session.

regions.description: ISO region codes (e.g. ["US"]). Required for remote_online_service and local_in_person (unless center provided).

center.description: Geo-center for local_in_person search. Required with radius_miles (unless regions provided).

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (1-200) for local_in_person center-based search.

ship_to_regions.description: ISO region codes for destination. Required for ship_to scope.

ships_from_regions.description: ISO region codes for origin. Optional for ship_to scope.

max_ship_days.description: Max shipping days (1-30). Optional for ship_to scope.

category_ids_any.description: Match listings in any of these category IDs.

scope_notes.description: Free-text scope description. Required for OTHER scope.

filters.description: Scope-specific filters. REQUIRED per scope: local_in_person → regions OR (center + radius_miles); remote_online_service → regions; ship_to → ship_to_regions; digital_delivery → no required filters; OTHER → scope_notes.

broadening.description: Optional broadening settings (deprecated, defaults to level 0).

credits_requested.description: Maximum credits to spend on this search call.

node_id.description: Restrict search to a specific node by ID.

username.description: Restrict search to a specific node by display name.

target.description: Optional target constraint to search a specific node.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous search response.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_unit
tools.description: Create a new unit (resource/listing). Free (0 credits). At minimum provide a title. Add type, scope_primary, and category_ids before publishing. Milestone grants: +100 credits at 10 unit creates and +100 at 20. Use fabric_get_categories for valid category IDs.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_publish_unit
tools.description: Publish a unit to make it visible in marketplace search. Free (0 credits). The unit must have title, type, and scope_primary set. Scope-specific fields are validated at publish time.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to publish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_unpublish_unit
tools.description: Remove a unit from public marketplace search. The unit remains in your inventory as a draft.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to unpublish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_request
tools.description: Create a new request (need/want). Free (0 credits). At minimum provide a title. Add type, scope_primary, and category_ids before publishing. Milestone grants: +100 credits at 10 request creates and +100 at 20. Optionally set need_by date and ttl_minutes.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

need_by.description: ISO date by which the need must be fulfilled.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_publish_request
tools.description: Publish a request to make it visible in marketplace search. Free (0 credits). The request must have title, type, and scope_primary set.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to publish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.description: Remove a request from public marketplace search. The request remains in your inventory as a draft.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to unpublish.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

row_version.description: Current row_version from the latest GET/list response.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g. "goods", "service"). Required at publish time.

scope_primary.description: Primary scope. Required at publish time.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

category_ids.description: Category IDs (array of integers). Use fabric_get_categories to discover valid IDs.

public_summary.description: Public summary shown in search results.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

origin_region.description: Origin region object {country_code, admin1, ...} (required for ship_to).

tools.name: fabric_get_unit
tools.description: Get a unit (resource) by ID. Returns full unit details including title, description, scope, condition, quantity, and publish status. Caller must own the unit.

unit_id.description: UUID of the unit to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_request
tools.description: Get a request (need) by ID. Returns full request details including title, description, scope, need_by, and publish status. Caller must own the request.

request_id.description: UUID of the request to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_offer
tools.description: Get an offer by ID. Returns offer status, hold summary, expiry, and negotiation thread info. Caller must be a party to the offer.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to retrieve.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_events
tools.description: Poll offer lifecycle events for the authenticated node. Returns events like offer_created, offer_accepted, offer_countered, etc. Use this as the fallback when your runtime cannot receive webhooks. Uses opaque cursor with strictly-after semantics.

since.description: Opaque cursor from previous response for strictly-after pagination.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_credits
tools.description: Get the authenticated node's current credit balance and subscription status. Use before searches to check affordability.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_create_offer
tools.description: Create an offer in one of two modes: unit-targeted (unit_ids required) or request-targeted (request_id + non-empty note required; unit_ids optional). Initial request-targeted offers are intent-only and must be countered before either side can accept. Offer notes must not include contact info. Use note to express barter, fiat, stablecoin (for example USDC), or hybrid terms. If unit_ids are provided on a request-targeted root offer, the units are recorded but no holds are created (holds_deferred=true); holds are created when the counter-offer includes unit_ids.

request_id.description: Optional request UUID target. If set, note must be a non-empty string.

unit_ids.description: Unit UUIDs. Required in unit-target mode. Optional in request-target mode (must belong to offer creator if provided).

thread_id.description: Optional thread UUID for counter-offers within an existing negotiation.

note.description: Optional note/message to include with the offer.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_counter_offer
tools.description: Counter an existing offer. Unit-target threads require unit_ids (existing behavior). Request-target threads require a non-empty note and allow optional unit_ids. Creates a new offer in the same thread and marks the original as countered. Counter notes must not include contact info. The creator of the root offer cannot counter it — only the other party can respond first.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to counter.

unit_ids.description: Optional array of unit UUIDs for the counter-offer. Required for unit-target threads.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_accept_offer
tools.description: Accept an offer. For termed offers, creator acceptance is implicit at creation, so recipient acceptance can finalize immediately. Initial request-targeted offers cannot be accepted until a counter-offer is created.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to accept.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_reject_offer
tools.description: Reject an offer (terminal). Only offers in pending, accepted_by_a, or accepted_by_b status can be rejected. Releases all holds immediately. Either party can reject. Optional reason is stored on the offer.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to reject.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_cancel_offer
tools.description: Cancel an offer you created. Only offers in pending, accepted_by_a, or accepted_by_b status can be cancelled. Releases all holds immediately. Only the offer creator can cancel.

offer_id.description: UUID of the offer to cancel.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_reveal_contact
tools.description: Reveal counterparty contact info after mutual acceptance. Returns email, phone, and messaging handles. Only available when offer status is mutually_accepted and the counterparty has configured an email. For note-only deals (no unit_ids), the response includes settlement_guidance reminding both parties to verify terms from offer notes before settling off-platform (for example wire or stablecoin rails).

offer_id.description: UUID of the mutually accepted offer.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_list_offers
tools.description: List offers you have made or received. Filter by role to see sent offers (made) or incoming offers (received). Optionally filter by request_id to see all offers targeting a specific request.

role.description: Filter: "made" for offers you sent, "received" for offers sent to you.

request_id.description: Optional UUID — filter offers targeting this request.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_credit_quote
tools.description: Get your credit balance, estimated search costs, available credit packs with prices, and subscription plans. Use this to understand pricing and check affordability before spending credits.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_buy_credit_pack_stripe
tools.description: Start a Stripe checkout to buy a credit pack. Returns a checkout_url to complete payment. Pack options: credits_500 ($9.99), credits_1500 ($19.99), credits_4500 ($49.99). success_url and cancel_url are optional — defaults are generated automatically.

success_url.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect to if payment is cancelled. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_subscribe_stripe
tools.description: Start a Stripe checkout for a subscription plan. Returns a checkout_url to complete signup. Plans: basic ($9.99/mo, 1000 credits), pro ($19.99/mo, 3000 credits), business ($49.99/mo, 10000 credits). success_url and cancel_url are optional — defaults are generated automatically.

plan_code.description: Subscription plan to sign up for.

success_url.description: URL to redirect to after successful signup. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect to if signup is cancelled. Optional — auto-generated if omitted.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_buy_credit_pack_crypto
tools.description: Create a crypto payment invoice for a credit pack. Only USDC on Solana is accepted. Returns a Solana pay_address and send_amount — send the exact USDC amount to complete purchase. Fully agent-native, no browser needed.

pay_currency.description: Must be "usdcsol" (USDC on Solana). Only accepted currency.

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_crypto_currencies
tools.description: List accepted crypto currencies for credit pack purchases. Currently only USDC on Solana ("usdcsol").

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_get_profile

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.

tools.name: fabric_update_profile
tools.description: Update your node profile. You can change display_name, email, messaging_handles (for contact reveal), and event_webhook_url (for offer event notifications).

messaging_handles.description: Array of {kind, handle, url} objects for contact reveal (max 10). Example: [{kind:"telegram", handle:"@mybot"}].

event_webhook_url.description: URL to receive offer lifecycle event webhooks.

event_webhook_secret.description: Secret for webhook signature verification (write-only, set null to clear).

session_token.description: Optional session token from fabric_login_session. Use when your MCP client cannot set Authorization headers.
